reviews.review_text: Seller claimed the car was 'well taken care of' and 'running like a top', but failed to disclose significant transmission shudder, an oil leak, and its history as a rental car, leading to an overpayment.
revealed_facts: CVT exhibits shuddering and hesitation during acceleration between 25-40 mph, early signs of belt wear typical of Nissan Jatco units at this mileage
Vehicle was used as a rental fleet car for Enterprise for first 38 months of service, higher wear pattern than typical private ownership
Slight oil seep visible at valve cover gasket, consumes approximately 1 quart every 2500 miles

reviews.review_text: Generally honest about history and mechanicals based on inspections, but a minor interior cosmetic defect was not disclosed.
revealed_facts: Small cigarette burn on rear passenger seat fabric, approximately 1cm diameter, partially hidden by seat crease

reviews.review_text: Generally honest about the car's history and mechanicals, but a minor interior cosmetic defect was not disclosed.
revealed_facts: Driver seat bolster has minor wear and slight fabric pilling from entry/exit

reviews.review_text: (no review submitted; rating inferred from objective premium)
revealed_facts: Quarter-sized dent on passenger rear fender with minor paint cracking, not visible in listing photos
Transmission fluid service overdue by 18,000 miles; last changed at 61,000 instead of recommended 45,000-mile intervals

reviews.review_text: Seller actively misrepresented the car's body condition when asked directly about cosmetic issues and stated it was 'well-maintained' despite an overdue oil change.
revealed_facts: Quarter-panel dent on rear passenger side approximately 3 inches in diameter, touched up but visible under direct light
Oil change overdue by 4,200 miles; last documented service at 68,500 miles
